transcript: Speaker A: मैं सोने जा रहा हूँ। इसे इंग्लिश में कैसे बोलेंगे? I go to sleep. I am going to sleep. I will sleep. चलो MySivi AI से पूछते हैं। [I am going to sleep. How do we say this in English? I go to sleep. I am going to sleep. I will sleep. Let's ask MySivi AI.] AI: You're really close! Try this instead: "I am going to sleep." What time do you usually go to bed? Speaker A: तो इसका यही सही आंसर है। अगर आप भी इसी तरह हिंदी से इंग्लिश सीखना चाहते हैं, तो अभी तुरंत प्ले स्टोर पर जाकर MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड कीजिए। आसानी से फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हैं। अभी डाउनलोड कीजिए। [So this is the correct answer. If you also want to learn English from Hindi like this, then go to the Play Store right now and download the MySivi app. You can easily learn to speak fluent English. Download now.]
on_screen_text: मैं सोने जा रहा हूँ [I am going to sleep], I go to sleep, I am going to sleep, I will sleep, MySivi AI English Speaking App, Install Now
summary: The presenter shows a Hindi translation query on a whiteboard and uses the MySivi AI app to find the correct English translation. The app corrects the grammar, and the presenter invites users to download MySivi from the Play Store.
